title: Running Up That Hill
why_this_song: Running Up That Hill by Kate Bush (1985) — selected for the English-through-music catalog. Use the sing-along prompts and exercises to drill pronunciation, vocabulary, and listening comprehension.

vocab_hooks.note: Appears 15 times; first heard in: "Be running up that road"
Appears 8 times; first heard in: "Be running up that hill"
Appears 6 times; first heard in: "Do you wanna hear about the deal that I'm making?"
Appears 5 times; first heard in: "It's you and me"
Appears 5 times; first heard in: "And I'd get Him to swap our places"

teaching_notes_md:
## Teaching notes

- Times are estimated from community-synced lyrics and may be off by 1–2 seconds.
- Start with the sing-along prompt, then move to listen-and-fill.
- For B1+ students, focus on the discussion questions.
copyright_notice: Short fair-use lyric excerpts only (Brazilian Lei 9.610/98 art. 46 VIII). No full lyrics stored.

lines: I'd make a deal with God
And I'd get Him to swap our places
It's you and me won't be unhappy

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "running" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "running" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "hill" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "hill" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: Put these three lines in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: Coloque estes três versos na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: It's you and me won't be unhappy
And I'd get Him to swap our places

exercises.prompt_en: And these three — put them in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: E estes três — coloque na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: Do you wanna feel how it feels?

exercises.prompt_en: If you had to summarize "Running Up That Hill" in one sentence to someone who has never heard it, what would you say?
exercises.prompt_pt: Se você tivesse que resumir "Running Up That Hill" em uma frase para alguém que nunca ouviu, o que diria?

exercises.prompt_en: What kind of person do you imagine the narrator of "Running Up That Hill" is? Describe their age, mood, and situation using at least three details from the lyrics.
exercises.prompt_pt: Que tipo de pessoa você imagina ser o narrador de "Running Up That Hill"? Descreva a idade, o humor e a situação usando pelo menos três detalhes da letra.

exercises.prompt_en: If you could ask Kate Bush one question about "Running Up That Hill", what would it be and why?
exercises.prompt_pt: Se você pudesse perguntar uma coisa para Kate Bush sobre "Running Up That Hill", o que seria e por quê?

exercises.prompt_en: Write the full form of each contraction:
exercises.prompt_pt: Escreva a forma completa de cada contração:
